title: Bridging Design Systems and Code with MCP and AI Agents
summary: IBM Technology explains how AI agents are reshaping software design by leveraging design systems and context engineering. The video discusses how MCP (Model Context Protocol) and AI agents work together to build consistent and correct applications.
writeup: This IBM Technology video explains how AI agents draw on design systems and context engineering to produce consistent, correct applications. It centers on the Model Context Protocol (MCP) as the mechanism connecting design systems to code, showing how agents and MCP operate together. The key takeaways: design systems supply the structured rules and components that keep generated applications consistent, and context management determines whether agents apply those rules correctly.
